name: BIRTH TRAUMA
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF SKULL AND SPINE DISORDERS
dominant_finding: T1- and T2-hyperintense lesion ← subacute hemorrhage
discriminating_features: crescent-shaped lesion adjacent to outer table of skull
